System-assigned part number for the component. This should be present in particular if the component is also an FRU (field replaceable unit)
System-assigned serial number of the component.

This field configures the sector BN to operate in dual-carrier (2x40 MHz) or quad-carrier (4x40 MHz) mode. Only 6-GHz BNs running software 2.0 or higher can operate in quad-carrier mode. A change in mode will result in a radio reset of the BN which will temporarily disconnect all connected RNs.

Configuring Multi-carrier Mode is not supported for 5 GHz RN, 3 GHz RN, and 6 GHz RNv. Multi-carrier mode can only be configured for 6 GHz RN running software version 2.0 or higher. Setting the mode to dual-carrier will force the 6 GHz RN to only use 2 carriers - even if its intended BN is transmitting on 4 carriers. Setting the mode to Autoselect will allow the RN use as many carriers (2 or 4) as the BN is using.
